name: Sweet Pink Pasta with White Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 4
Combine sifted flour and icing sugar with egg and a tiny drop of coloring in a food processor. Process until the mixture forms a ball. Knead dough on lightly floured surface until smooth and evenly colored; knead in more coloring if desired.
Roll dough through pasta machine on the thickest setting; fold in half, repeat several times. Roll dough until 1 mm thick using the pasta machine. Cut into 1 cm strips using the fettucine attachment on the machine.
Add pasta to a large pan of boiling water, bring to a boil, uncovered for about 5 minutes or until just tender; drain. Serve with warm pasta topped with warm sauce. White Chocolate Sauce: Heat milk and cream in a pan, do not boil. Remove from heat, add chocolate, stir until melted, stir in liqueur and nutmeg.
